title: Join
description: We are hiring people who want to grow with us in workforce services, HR, and BPO.
emptyStateDescription: There are currently no published vacancies. Please check again soon.

vacancies.title: Staff Accounting
vacancies.summary: Handle daily transaction records, reconciliation, and support monthly financial reporting to keep company finance operations accurate and on schedule.
responsibilities: Record daily financial transactions (AR/AP, cash, bank) accurately and on time.
Perform bank reconciliation and ensure balance consistency in books.
Support monthly financial report preparation and audit documents.
Prepare basic tax administration documents and supporting files.
Collaborate with internal teams to maintain finance process compliance.
requirements: Minimum D3/S1 in Accounting or related field.
Solid understanding of basic accounting principles and bookkeeping cycle.
Proficient in Microsoft Excel (lookup, pivot, basic formulas).
Detail-oriented and able to work with deadlines.
Experience with accounting software is a plus.
benefits: BPJS Health and BPJS Employment coverage.
Career growth opportunities in the finance function.

application.method: Send your updated CV and supporting documents by email.
application.subject: Application Staff Accounting - [Full Name]
steps: Send your application email using the requested subject format.
Our HR team will run an initial document screening.
Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interviews.
